name: memory-operations-v1
description: Privacy-safe replay set for AgentMemory-inspired memory operations: facets, graph explanations, retention governance, source refs, and action frontier recall.

queries.query: facet dimension storefront apparel replay operation
graph path explanation bounded relation path evidence
retention quarantine suppression dry run governance decision
source ref redaction preview citation safe user facing output
action frontier relevance active lease checkpoint next action

memories.content: Facet filter positive replay operation: product memories tagged with dimension storefront apparel should be included when the facet filter value matches.
Graph path explanation replay requires bounded relation path evidence with sanitized labels and stable hop counts for memory operation retrieval.
Retention quarantine suppression is governed by dry run retention decisions; quarantined candidates stay out of default user-facing recall until reviewed.
Source ref redaction returns safe previews and citation handles for user facing output while omitting full transcript text, local paths, and credential-shaped strings.
Action frontier relevance ranks active lease checkpoint next action records so agents can continue pending memory operation work without exposing action bodies.
Unrelated dashboard spacing note for card rhythm, accent colors, and visual density.
